headline: Terreno Realty Announces Sale of Industrial Property in Torrance
summary: TRNO sells a fully leased Torrance industrial property for $31.1M, securing a 10.3% IRR as it continues strategic portfolio optimization efforts.

headline: Prologis expands global footprint with European joint venture
summary: Logistics warehouse operator Prologis announces its second major joint venture this year. The post Prologis expands global footprint with European joint venture appeared first on FreightWaves.

headline: Terreno Realty's Q1 Update: Are Occupancy & Rent Trends Still Strong?
summary: TRNO's Q1 update shows strong occupancy, rising rents and active deals but signals a shift toward more balanced growth in 2026.

headline: La Caisse and Prologis Launch Pan-European Logistics Joint Venture
summary: La Caisse (formerly CDPQ), a global investment group, and Prologis, Inc. (NYSE: PLD) today announce an agreement to create Prologis Logistics Investment Venture Europe (PLIVE), a new pan–European joint venture focused on acquiring, developing and operating high-quality logistics properties.

headline: La Caisse And Prologis Launch EUR1B Pan-European Logistics JV PLIVE With 844000 Sqm Portfolio Across France Germany Netherlands Sweden And UK, La Caisse Holds 70% Stake
